ValidationRule.description: Ensure the SAP Order # is only 7 or 8 digits.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) ,ISCHANGED(SAP_Order__c) , NOT(ISBLANK(SAP_Order__c)) , OR( LEN( SAP_Order__c )>8 ,LEN( SAP_Order__c )< 7 ,NOT(REGEX( SAP_Order__c ,"[0-9]*")) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_076: The SAP Order # must be all numbers and either 7 or 8 digits long.
